Functional Design Case Study

Aerospace Digital Traceability:
Turbine Blade Lifecycle in Odoo 18

Rolls-Royce Civil Aerospace — AS9100 Compliance & Digital Thread

Prepared by Roy Chambers
Role Senior Architect & Functional Lead
Focus AS9100 Compliance · MES-ERP Integration · Digital Thread
1
Project Objective

The goal of this Proof of Concept (PoC) was to architect a seamless “Digital Thread” for high-precision aerospace manufacturing. Mirroring the complex requirements of Rolls-Royce Civil Aerospace, the implementation ensures 100% material traceability from raw superalloy melt-lots to finished serialised engine components.

2
Architectural Strategy

Make-to-Order (MTO) & Demand Synchronisation

To eliminate inventory waste and ensure specific customer demand drives the shop floor, I implemented Replenish on Order (MTO) logic. A Sales Order from a Tier-1 client (e.g., British Airways Engineering) acts as the master trigger, automatically generating a linked Manufacturing Order (MO) and procurement requests for raw materials.

MES Layer & Shop Floor Routing

Drawing on deep expertise in Opcenter Execution Discrete, I mapped a high-fidelity manufacturing routing with integrated work-centre costing (£85.00/hr):

  • Vacuum Casting — Material consumption of CMSX-4 Superalloy.
  • 5-Axis CNC Machining — High-precision subtractive manufacturing.
  • NDT Inspection — The final compliance “Quality Gate.”
3
Data Integrity & Quality Assurance

The Digital Birth Certificate

The core of the implementation is the 1:1 linkage between raw material Melt Lots and finished Unique Serial Numbers. This ensures that if a material defect is identified, every impacted component across the global fleet can be instantly recalled.

Procedural Compliance (Quality Gates)

To mirror AS9100 standards, I established a “Quality Gate” within the MES chatter. No component can reach the “Done” status without a digital NDT Pass Certificate being uploaded and verified, creating an unbreakable audit trail.

4
Stakeholder Value & Transparency

The data flow extends to a secure Customer Portal, providing the client with real-time visibility into production milestones. This reduces administrative overhead and fosters high-trust relationships with major airline engineering departments.

5
Key Outcomes
✓
100% Audit Readiness

Instant generation of “Digital Birth Certificates” (Traceability Reports).

✓
Granular Costing

Accurate machine-time and labour variance analysis per serialised part.

✓
Agile Implementation

Proving that enterprise-grade aerospace compliance can be achieved through lean, cloud-ready ERP configuration.
